description_wiki: Sweden, formally the Kingdom of Sweden, is a Nordic country located on the Scandinavian Peninsula in Northern Europe.

description: city in and the county seat of Kanabec County, Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: Mora is a city and the county seat of Kanabec County, Minnesota.

description: university located in the city of Lund in the province of Scania, Sweden
description_wiki: Lund University (Swedish: Lunds universitet) is a public research university in Sweden and one of Northern Europe's oldest universities.

description: urban area in Osby Municipality, Sweden
description_wiki: Osby (Swedish pronunciation: [ˈûːsbʏ]) is a locality and the seat of Osby Municipality, Scania County, Sweden with 7,157 inhabitants in 2010 and 13,238 inhabitants in 2022.
Andrew Berg (Anders Berg; October 16, 1869 — March 1, 1939) was an immigrant to the District of Alaska who was a prominent fisher, hunter, and trapper.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Minnesota is a state in the Upper Midwestern region of the United States.

description: county courthouse in Mora, United States of America
description_wiki: The Kanabec County Courthouse, located at 18 Vine Street North in Mora, Kanabec County in the U.S. state of Minnesota is a beige brick, Romanesque building, featuring a prominent 4-story center tower.

description: human settlement in Mille Lacs County, Minnesota, United States of America
description_wiki: Wahkon is a city in Mille Lacs County, Minnesota, United States.

description: Norwegian priest, translator and contributing editor (1916-1998)
description_wiki: Arthur Bjarne Berg (8 April 1916 – 20 July 1998) was a Norwegian newspaper editor.
